headline: Travelers (TRV) Just Posted A Big Earnings Beat On Lower Catastrophe Losses
summary: Travelers Companies (NYSE:TRV) reported second quarter earnings that significantly exceeded prior expectations. Results were driven by lower catastrophe losses, higher investment income, and strong underwriting performance. Management highlighted both underwriting and investment outcomes as key contributors to the quarter. For investors watching large US property and casualty insurers, Travelers Companies sits at the center of discussions on insurance pricing, risk selection, and capital...
